proposition: Blackfish & Co. s.r.o.'s own filed balance sheets (as a micro accounting unit, no P&L required) show total assets of only 6.75M CZK (FY2024) and 8.25M CZK (FY2025) with equity around 2.6–2.7M CZK — financially tiny next to Able.cz's own 71.9M CZK total assets. Most of the scale implied by the self-reported 'combined ~60 people, ~100M CZK' framing evidently comes from Able.cz itself, not from Blackfish.
